ModMetaData.name: RimDoctor TEST — Broken Content
ModMetaData.author: tyler
ModMetaData.description:
Deliberately broken test mod for verifying RimDoctor.
Contains a ThingDef whose texture path points at a texture that does not exist. With RimDoctor's texture fallback ON, loading/spawning this item shows a magenta placeholder instead of returning null (which would freeze/crash). With fallback OFF you get the vanilla null-texture failure.
DO NOT ship this. It lives under Dev/ for testing only.
